ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan (e.g., Free, Startup, Team, Enterprise) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the plan */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the plan is active */,
  "trial_period" INTEGER /* Number of days in the trial period for each plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Financial data, Price-volume difference indicator) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of feature (e.g., financial data, analytics tool) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feature is enabled or disabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_features" (
  "plan_feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan-feature relationship */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "is_included" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the feature is included in the plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the plan-feature relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the plan-feature relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_features_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_features_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's subscription plan */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (browser and device information) of the user at the time of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume traded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the financial data (e.g., API, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_volume_diff" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price-volume difference indicator */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator */,
  "price_volume_diff" REAL /* Difference between price and volume */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price-volume difference data (e.g., API, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the price-volume difference data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the price-volume difference data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "on_chain_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each on-chain data entry */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the blockchain asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., network growth, transaction volume) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the on-chain data (e.g., API, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the on-chain data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the on-chain data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_growth" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network growth metric */,
  "asset_id" TEXT /* ID of the blockchain asset */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the network */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the network growth data (e.g., API, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the network growth data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the network growth data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug report, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the user's feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "token" TEXT /* Session token for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
